ns0:entry.ns0:title: DaoCloud/public-image-mirror
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DaoCloud/public-image-mirror
Language: shell
很多镜像都在国外。比如 gcr 。国内下载很慢，需要加速。致力于提供连接全世界的稳定可靠安全的容器镜像服务。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
Language: shell
Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eugr/spark-vllm-docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eugr/spark-vllm-docker
Language: shell
Docker configuration for running VLLM on dual DGX Sparks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: justlovemaki/openclaw-docker-cn-im
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/justlovemaki/openclaw-docker-cn-im
Language: shell
OpenClaw 的中国IM平台整合Docker版本，预装并配置了飞书、钉钉、QQ机器人、企业微信等主流中国IM软件的插件，让您可以快速部署一个支持多个中国IM平台的 AI 机器人网关

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kweaver-ai/kweaver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kweaver-ai/kweaver
Language: shell
KWeaver Core is a harness-first foundation for enterprise decision agents. It turns fragmented data, knowledge, tools, and policies into governed context, safe execution, and verifiable feedback loops. With semantic modeling, real-time access, runtime control, and TraceAI, it helps AI systems reason, adapt, and act reliable in complex enterprises.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: llm-d/llm-d
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d
Language: shell
Achieve state of the art inference performance with modern accelerators on Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nelvko/clash-for-linux-install
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nelvko/clash-for-linux-install
Language: shell
